assistance.title: NEED ASSISTANCE?
assistance.description: Explorer detailed guides and resources in our Help Center
assistance.supportDescription: We're here to help you with any questions or issues you may have

item1.q: How long does it take to get a permit?
item1.a: The processing time for a permit typically varies depending on the type of request. Generally, it takes between 24-48 hours for standard applications. You will receive an email notification once your permit is approved.

item2.q: How do I get a permit when I need it?
item2.a: You can request a permit through our online portal by filling out the application form and uploading the required documents. Once submitted, our team will review your request.

item3.q: What documents are required for the application?
item3.a: Required documents typically include a valid ID, company registration details, and specific documents related to your visit or vehicle entry.

item4.q: How can I track my application status?
item4.a: You can track your application status using the 'Track Application' button on the home page and entering your reference number.

item5.q: Is there a fast-track option available?
item5.a: Yes, we offer fast-track processing for urgent needs. Please select the 'Fast-Track' option during the application process.

item6.q: What should I do if my permit is rejected?
item6.a: If your permit is rejected, you will receive an email with the reason for rejection. You can correct the issues and resubmit your application.
